div.p: Best for: • Dynamic composition • Frequent structural changes • Rare components • Avoid archetype fragmentation
Operations: • Add/Remove: O(1) amortized • Lookup: O(1) • Iteration: O(n) with indirection
Best for: • Stable composition • Massive iteration workloads • SIMD-friendly data layout • Cache-optimal access
Operations: • Add/Remove: O(components) migration • Lookup: O(1) • Iteration: O(n) sequential
Strategy: • Common components → Archetype • Rare/dynamic → Sparse Set • Track via component mask

g.text: • Frequent: >10% of frame budget on structural changes
• Stable: Component composition changes <1% per frame

div.p: Sparse Set: • Status effects (buffs/debuffs) • Inventory items • Temporary flags
Archetype: • Position + Velocity (physics) • Transform + RenderData • AI + Pathfinding
